content.description:
Dedicated task items with status tracking, due dates, and subtasks.

## Concept

- Task items with: title, description, due date, priority, status (todo/in-progress/done)
- Subtasks via attachments (hierarchical)
- Tags and contexts for organization
- Time tracking

## Design Options

| Approach | Pros | Cons |
|----------|------|------|
| **Separate task type** | Dedicated renderer, task-specific features | More complex |
| **Notes with task properties** | Simpler, flexible, uses existing infrastructure | Less structured |

## Implementation Notes

The item system already supports this — create a task type with fields for status, due date, priority. Build a task view that renders these fields with appropriate widgets. A kanban-style view could display tasks grouped by status.

## Priority

Medium — useful for personal productivity. Could be built entirely in userland (new type + view + field editors).
